compiled_state.title: [test-ticket-transition-flock]: Misleading function name test_flock_llm_format_referenced -> Checks reduce_ticket behavior, not llm_format
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: Test function test_flock_llm_format_referenced in tests/scripts/test-ticket-transition-flock.sh retains a misleading name. The function now verifies that reduce_ticket() is called inside the flock body and no subprocess reducer is used. The name was preserved for .test-index RED marker compatibility, but the RED marker was removed in the same diff.
File: tests/scripts/test-ticket-transition-flock.sh
Category: maintainability
Remediation: Rename test_flock_llm_format_referenced to test_flock_reduce_ticket_in_flock_body (and update .test-index if needed).
